1.label: On/Off (Button)
1.description: Sends control commands to the associated devices whenever the Wall Plug is turned on or off using the B-button.

2.label: On/Off (Power)
2.description: Sends control commands to the associated devices depending on the current load (parameters 50-52).

3.label: Lifeline
3.description: Reports the relay status and allows for assigning single device only (main controller by default).

paramInformation.label: 'Always On' Mode
paramInformation.description: When active, the Wall Plug keeps the connected device constantly on and stops reacting to alarm frames and B-button pushes.

paramInformation.label: Response to Alarm Frames
paramInformation.description: Ignored when the 'Always On' mode is active.

options.label: Cyclically change device state every second

paramInformation.label: Immediate Power Report
paramInformation.description: Power load change in percent that results in sending a power report with the highest priority

paramInformation.label: Standard Power Load Report
paramInformation.description: Power load change in percent that results in sending a power report

paramInformation.label: Power Reporting Frequency
paramInformation.description: How frequently standard power reports (parameter 42) will be sent

options.label: Report only per parameter 47 or when polled

paramInformation.label: Power and Energy Periodic Reports
paramInformation.description: Time period between reports sent when changes in power load have not been recorded

paramInformation.label: DOWN Value
paramInformation.description: Lower power threshold, used in parameter 52.

paramInformation.label: UP Value
paramInformation.description: Upper power threshold, used in parameter 52.

paramInformation.label: Action in Case of Exceeding Defined Power Values
paramInformation.description: Defines the way 2nd association group devices are controlled

options.label: Turn associated devices on when power drops below the lower threshold
Turn associated devices off when power drops below the lower threshold
Turn associated devices on when power rises above the upper threshold
Turn associated devices off when power rises above the upper threshold

paramInformation.label: Power Load for Violet Color
paramInformation.description: Active only when parameter 61 is set to 0 or 1.

paramInformation.label: LED Ring Color When Device Is On

options.label: Color changes in steps depending on power
Color changes continuously depending on power

paramInformation.label: LED Ring Color When Device Is Off
LED Ring Color At Z-Wave Alarm Detection
Overload Safety Switch
paramInformation.description: Values above 32000 (3200 W) disable the function.

metadata.inclusion: Triple click the B-button located on the Plug's casing.
metadata.exclusion: Triple click the B-button located on the Plug's casing.
metadata.reset:
1. Insert the Plug into a socket.
2. Press and hold the B-button for 15-20 seconds until the LED ring glows yellow.
3. Release the B-button.
4. Press the B-button briefly.
